tool_definitions.name: memory_delete
tool_definitions.description: Delete a memory record by ID. Removes the file and updates the MEMORY.md index.

tool_definitions.name: memory_recall
tool_definitions.description: Retrieve memories relevant to a query or topic. Returns matching memories ranked by relevance.

tool_definitions.name: memory_search
tool_definitions.description: Search memories by keyword, type, or date range. All inputs are optional — an empty search returns all memories.

tool_definitions.name: memory_store
tool_definitions.description: Store a new memory record. Checks for duplicates by name and type. Use force: true to overwrite an existing memory with the same name.

steps.message: MCP transport: connecting
MCP transport: connected

Use the memory_store tool to store a feedback memory with name "testing approach", description "always write failing tests first", type "feedback", and content "Rule: write failing tests before implementation.\n**Why:** catches regressions early.\n**How to apply:** TDD workflow for all new features.". Then use the memory_recall tool with query "testing" to retrieve it. Finally use the memory_search tool with type "feedback" to search for feedback memories.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store a new memory record. Checks for duplicates by name and type. Use force: true to overwrite an existing memory with the same name.

arguments.content:
Rule: write failing tests before implementation.
**Why:** catches regressions early.
**How to apply:** TDD workflow for all new features.
arguments.name: testing approach

steps.message: memory_store({"description":"always write failing tests first","content":"Rule: write failing tests before implementation.\n**Why:** catches regressions early.\n**How to apply:** TDD workflow for all new features.","name":"testing approach","type":"feedback"})

Then use the memory_recall tool with query "testing" to retrieve it. Finally use the memory_search tool with type "feedback" to search for feedback memories.
